title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 140.995 - Rent or lease of property
text:
140.995.  Rent or lease of property. — Notwithstanding any provision of sections 140.980 to 140.995 to the contrary, a land bank agency may rent or lease property held by the land bank agency for community, noncommercial agricultural uses.
(L. 2024 H.B. 2062)
